actions.what: Event risk: Middle East oil/rates shock can affect new-buy timing
actions.your_move: Review exposure, hedges, and new buys before acting today: Middle East oil/rates shock can affect new-buy timing (oil, rates, volatility, energy, growth). If the event changes oil/rates/vol or a held sleeve, decide whether to hold, hedge, trim, or wait.
actions.why: Fundstrat technical work flagged a near-term WTI and 10-year yield bounce tied to Gulf/Iran-war headlines before a possible reversal; review exposure before new risk adds.
actions.why_it_moves_goal: Fast exogenous shocks can change sizing, hedging, and opportunity cost before normal source lanes update.
missing_evidence: WTI approaches 99-101, 10Y yield approaches roughly 4.55-4.59, or Strait/ceasefire headlines change abruptly.

actions.what: Conviction gap: NVDA is under target
actions.your_move: NVDA is 6.6% vs 12.0% target. Decide: add with funding, hold below target with a written reason, cut the target, or remove it from the model. If adding, run the pre-trade gate; no auto-buy.
actions.why: Target drift shows a 5.4pp sizing gap vs the AI working model.
actions.sizing: Gap to target: 5.4pp; target is directional, not an order.
actions.why_it_moves_goal: A high-conviction target gap can make the right thesis too small to matter unless disposition is explicit.

actions.your_move: ANET looks good (Promising, LEADING) — size it yourself and run the pre-trade gate. No auto-buy.
actions.why: ANET: Promising and the tape's with it (LEADING) — a place to start.
actions.why_it_moves_goal: A conviction-backed sizing gap can make a right call too small.

signal_log.signal: Macro: complacent vol plus steep curve cyclical tailwind
signal_log.note: VIX near 16 and 2s10s near +41 bps create risk-on/financials tailwind context; hedge cost may be favorable. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Iran escalation: US strikes plus prediction-market divergence
signal_log.note: Fresh strikes and whale prediction-market divergence create fast geopolitical risk context for defense, nuclear fuel, and safe-haven sleeves. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil rallying on Iran/Hormuz, inflation and macro watch
signal_log.note: USO rose roughly 5% week-over-week as Hormuz disruption stayed relevant; matters as inflation/rates input ahead of FOMC. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil spike on renewed Iran-US strikes
signal_log.ticker: USO, ITA, LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE
signal_log.note: Oil shock can pressure AI-heavy multiples through inflation/rates while supporting defense and nuclear/critical-minerals watch sleeves. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil down on US-Iran de-escalation and nuclear-deal expectations
signal_log.ticker: LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE, ITA
signal_log.note: Lower oil and yields create a risk-on book tailwind but mixed read for nuclear, energy-transition, and defense sleeves; oil direction is the hard tell. Watch-only.
Higher metals tariffs and ended exemptions are a policy tailwind for domestic materials and critical-minerals exposure. Watch-only.

event_risk.title: Middle East oil/rates shock can affect new-buy timing
event_risk.source: Fundstrat Gmail full-body read: Jun 3 FlashInsights / Daily Technical Strategy
event_risk.summary: Fundstrat technical work flagged a near-term WTI and 10-year yield bounce tied to Gulf/Iran-war headlines before a possible reversal; review exposure before new risk adds.
event_risk.trigger: WTI approaches 99-101, 10Y yield approaches roughly 4.55-4.59, or Strait/ceasefire headlines change abruptly.

event_risk.title: Financials breakdown and crypto-linked weakness weigh on tape breadth
event_risk.source: Fundstrat Gmail full-body read: Daily Technical Strategy
event_risk.summary: Fundstrat technical work flagged equal-weight financial weakness and crypto-linked financial pressure as a tape negative that may persist over coming weeks.
event_risk.trigger: RYF remains below support near 74.40, crypto-linked financials fail to stabilize, or XLF/RYF relative weakness accelerates.

event_risk.title: Narrow AI leadership versus improving equal-weight participation
event_risk.source: Fundstrat Gmail full-body read: Mark Newton webinar notice
event_risk.summary: Fundstrat noted narrow semiconductor/AI leadership, oil swings, and a potential breadth shift as a rotation risk to monitor rather than an all-clear tape read.
event_risk.trigger: Mag 7/AI leadership weakens while equal-weight participation improves, or oil swings disrupt growth leadership.
